final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [1:0] state
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            state <= 2'b00; // Reset state to 0
        end else begin
            state <= (state == 2'b11) ? 2'b00 : state + 1; // Increment state or wrap around
        end
    end
endmodule
